description: Displays a department or school name, used in person profiles and listing teasers.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Department name as a div with paragraph child

props.name: School of Mathematical and Physical Sciences
School of Sociological Studies, Politics and International Relations

notes: In the DOM two variants exist: a div>p structure (used in person profiles) and a bare span (used in listing teasers like .stap-teaser). The div>p is by far more common (8197 pages). The span variant wraps the text directly with no child element. The 'as' prop can be used to switch the root element when used as a span; when rendered as span the inner p should be omitted. Implement with conditional rendering based on root element type.
